body_text:
24:19 â May 3, 2024
Update to the Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We removed a reference to bill payment reversals for CRA Business Taxes remittances from
the
Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725.
As of May 5, 2024, same-day reversals for bill payments to CRA billers are not available. See the
Changes to Same Day Bill Payment Reversals
news item on the Client Centre for more information.
The Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only.
